findings.problem: Delete action remains clickable even when selected batches have on-hand inventory, causing reactive blocked errors after user intent is committed.
findings.recommendation: Gate delete action pre-click using selection eligibility checks (onHandQty <= 0), disable destructive action when blocked rows exist, and expose blocked count with one-click 'Select eligible only'.

findings.problem: Blocked delete emits both toast.error and persistent save-state error indicator, splitting attention and increasing cognitive load.
findings.recommendation: Use contextual in-surface error banner for blocked delete; reserve toasts for success and undo confirmations only.

findings.problem: The inventory work surface becomes visually busy during batch operations because filters, stats, selection actions, and error states compete in the same viewport at the same time.
findings.recommendation: Introduce a focused selection mode: simplify visible chrome while rows are selected, keep all functions available via progressive disclosure, and prioritize the active batch task strip over secondary dashboard content.

findings.problem: Blocked-delete message explains prerequisite actions but does not provide direct recovery controls in-context.
findings.recommendation: Add actionable banner CTAs: 'Select eligible only', 'Adjust quantity', and 'Open Receiving'.

findings.problem: Undo is toast-transient and can expire before keyboard and assistive-technology users can trigger it.
findings.recommendation: Add persistent in-surface fallback control: 'Undo last delete' in status bar while undo window is active.

findings.problem: Request ID metadata is surfaced in user-facing error text, adding noise during operations.
findings.recommendation: Strip request-id from primary message in inventory flow and expose support id behind optional 'Details' / 'Copy error ID'.

findings.problem: Some header icon-only controls rely on title tooltips and may not provide robust screen-reader labels.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit aria-labels to all icon-only header controls and preserve visible focus states.

findings.problem: Global sidebar module hierarchy and workspace-tab hierarchy are visually close, increasing orientation risk.
findings.recommendation: Introduce explicit hierarchy labeling: 'Global module' in workspace header and 'Workspace tabs' label in tab row.
